name: ADP, Inc.
lede: ADP runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Hyderabad, Pune and Bengaluru, covering ssc, built over 23 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one ADP office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: ADP, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: ADP runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Pune, Bengaluru), covering ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: ADP's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Pune and Bengaluru, spanning ssc. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 55 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does ADP operate in India?
faq.a: ADP operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does ADP have GCC centers in?
faq.a: ADP's India GCC footprint spans Hyderabad, Pune and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does ADP run in India?
faq.a: ADP runs ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at ADP's India GCCs?
faq.a: ADP's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads ADP's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 55 leaders at ADP's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
